examples: Based on the principles and methods of cladistics, the phylogeny in Kengyilia of Poaceae is analysed in the present paper.
The phylogeny of the known 427 genera of Tenthredinoidea of world was reconstructed using the principle and methods of cladistics.
Using cladistics methods, we studied both outer and osteological characters of 4 fish groups, Cyprinus, Barbodes, Schizothorax (Racoma) and Paracobitis, endemic to Erhai Lake.
